note: Built event detail screen with: collapsing SliverAppBar with event image, event type badge, full event name/heading, time section card with start/end in local timezone, detailed buff/bonus tiles with multiplier and disclaimer info, featured Pokemon grid with shiny indicators, feature chips (spawns/research), promo codes display, and flag toggle button (placeholder for backend integration). Added /event/:id route to GoRouter. Wired EventCard tap to navigate to detail screen.
